## What changed

<!-- One-liner describing the change. If it's a behaviour change, say what the old behaviour was and what it is now. -->

## Why

<!-- Linked issue or motivation. What problem does this fix? What value does it add? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (or PR title contains `[skip-changelog]` / PR has `skip-changelog` label)
- [ ] STATUS.md updated if feature status moved (planned → wip, wip → done, new decision entry, new tech debt)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behaviour
- [ ] Typecheck + lint pass locally
- [ ] For UI changes: screenshot or screen recording attached

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Steps to reproduce the check. -->

## Risk / rollback

<!-- What blows up if this is wrong? How do you revert? Delete this section if the change is trivial. -->
